title: Face It Till You Make It The Panic Years
company: Shouldn't Have Said That Theatre Company
description: Face it till you make it - The Panic Years, created by Shouldn’t Have Said That Theatre Company. This bold, unfiltered show dives into the messy, hilarious, and painfully relatable reality of stumbling through your late twenties on the brink of thirty. Through sharp storytelling and brutally honest humour, it exposes the pressures of pretending to have life figured out while juggling careers, relationships, social lives, and the relentless expectations of social media. From the awkward intimacy of smear tests to the clash between generations, and the chaos of adulthood no one warned us about, this show celebrates imperfection and speaks the truths we all think but rarely dare to say out loud. A love letter and a reality check for anyone learning to survive adulthood one questionable decision at a time. You can support Shouldn't Have Said that Theatre Company and keep up to date on future shows and all back stage shenanigans via their socials - Instagram: @shouldnthavesaidthattheatreco
